case_title: DAVIS HENRY VS PETERSON, MICHAEL A & PACIFIC NORTHWEST MORGAGE CO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,750.00 FILED BY DAVIS HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON, MICHAEL A & PACIFIC NORTHWEST MORGAGE CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO MICHAEL PETERSON RETURNED SIGNED.
CERT. LETTER TO MICHAEL PETERSON RETURNED, NEED CORRECT INMATE NAME.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETERSON, MICHAEL A & PACIFIC NORTHWEST MORGAGE CO $4,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,770.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT OF DEC-15-1993, GRANTED
